plugins.name: domain-teams
plugins.description: Domain team skills — planning (企画), code, design, research with checkpoint-based quality gates

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault workflows — daily notes, diagrams, file intel, vault management, dashboard design

plugins.name: philosophers-toolkit
plugins.description: Philosophical thinking frameworks for problem clarification and deeper reasoning. 哲學思考框架。哲学的思考フレームワーク。

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Developer workflow skills — skill creation (skill-creator-advance), portable git-backed project memory (git-memory), and multi-item proposal triage (proposal-critique). Git コミット・メモリ。可攜式專案記憶。提案審查。

plugins.name: investing-toolkit
plugins.description: Investing research toolkit — macro regime diagnosis (US/JP/TW/KR/CN), DCF and screening workflows, equity snapshots via yfinance, FRED, BOJ, FinMind, FinanceDataReader, and akshare adapters. 投資調査・美股・台股・日本株・韓國股・中國股。投資研究工具組。

plugins.name: copywriting-toolkit
plugins.description: Pipeline-structured copywriting toolkit — 14 specialized skills (intake, ideation, neta injection, 5 form-specific drafters, voice positioning, voice tone, ethics gate, form gate, audit). Grounded in 神田昌典 PASONA, 谷山雅計 discipline, Cialdini, Schwartz, FTC Endorsement / 景品表示法 ethics. 文案寫作工具組。コピーライティング・パイプライン。

plugins.name: slides-toolkit
plugins.description: Google Slides generation toolkit — template-based deck pipeline via googleworkspace/cli (gws), backend-agnostic design knowledge (Minto / SCQA / chart-selection), and Platform-Pivot multi-backend architecture. MVP ships google-slides backend only; html / pptx / marp backends are Phase 2+ trigger-gated. Google Slides 自動生成ツールキット。簡報自動化工具組。
